import axios from'axios';// Create axios instance with base configuration
const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:5000/api';const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL,timeout:10000,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});// Request interceptor to add auth token

api.interceptors.response.use(response=>{return response;},error=>{var _error$response;if(((_error$response=error.response)===null||_error$response===void 0?void 0:_error$response.status)===401){// Token expired or invalid
localStorage.removeItem('token');window.location.href='/login';}return Promise.reject(error);});export default api;
